name: Refill request for non-existent prescription
description: Patient requests a refill for a prescription that is not on file.
goal: Obtain a refill for an allergy medication that seems to not be on record.
behavior: Insist on the need for the medication due to upcoming travel
Express surprise that the prescription is not on file and ask for next steps
success_criteria: Agent must correctly identify that the prescription is not on file
Agent should offer to connect the patient to a pharmacist or doctor for clarification
Agent should reassure the patient and provide guidance on how to obtain the prescription
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests a refill for a non-existent prescription.
